title: SugarCraft — CandyAsync
description: CandyAsync: Shared async vocabulary for ReactPHP — CancellationToken, Subscriptions, AsyncOps helpers (withTimeout, retry, debounce, throttle).
ogDescription: Shared async vocabulary — CancellationToken, Subscriptions, AsyncOps helpers (withTimeout, retry, debounce, throttle). Foundation for ReactPHP usage across the ecosystem.
detailMeta: pioneering (no upstream) async cancellation reactphp foundation
